name: Kyoto
summary: Primary cultural anchor with strong neighborhood identity and dense temple-adjacent activity context.

parent_refs.label: Kansai
notes: Use the regional shell when expanding beyond a Kyoto-first route.

seasonal_signals.summary: Leaf season creates crowding around temple corridors and early-morning transit peaks.
notes: Operational friction increases around headline sites.
Central neighborhoods work best when the traveler tolerates walking between clusters.

experience_signals.label: Culture density
notes: High concentration of temples, gardens, and traditional districts.

adjacency_refs.summary: Fast regional transfer for contrasting food/nightlife days.

region_expansion_refs.summary: Easy heritage-oriented side trip without changing base.

operational_notes: Bus crowding can make cross-town moves slower than map distance suggests.
